description: Per-image content tags (Claude's visual judgement, user-verified). Keyed by <bucket>/<filename> — the stable local-content identity. Joined to asset-map.json on the filename key at authoring time: this file says what's in the picture, asset-map says how to reference it. Tags are content-intrinsic and independent of Milovana IDs.

subject: solo
machine
partner
vocabulary.pace: Energy/tempo only, independent of explicitness. 1 (still/posed) to 5 (frantic/hard); BPM-banded (1:<=40, 2:40-70, 3:70-110, 4:110-150, 5:150+).
